title: AgentSessionDescriptor
description: Describes the identity and context of a CHP agent session: intent, model, memory scope, autonomy tier, and tool manifest.

session_id.description: The unique identifier for this agent session (also serves as the evidence correlation ID).

intent.description: Natural-language description of what this session is trying to accomplish.

model.description: The inference model used (e.g. claude-sonnet-4-6). Null if not applicable or unknown.

memory_scope.description: The memory scope this session operates in by default.

autonomy_tier.description: How much human oversight this session requires. automated = fully autonomous; human_driven = human controls every action.

tool_manifest.description: Capability IDs the session is permitted to invoke.

parent_session_id.description: Session ID of the parent if this is a delegated sub-session. Null for top-level sessions.

metadata.description: Arbitrary additional context for the session.
